response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, aligning with the required AI agent development skill. His work with Vitest-equivalent testing (TDD, CI/CD, Selenium courses) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is well-documented. He has used PostgreSQL/MySQL/MongoDB and has deep backend/frontend experience across multiple languages including Java and Kotlin equivalents (DLang, C#, C++). His open-source projects and workshops demonstrate strong communication, collaboration, and process improvement skills. His education includes a CS bachelor’s degree. Minor gaps: no explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest by name, and German is only basic — but not critical for an individual contributor role in Berlin with English fluency. His portfolio strongly matches all core technical and behavioral requirements.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven AI-agent infrastructure experience and contributions to agentic workflows
Strong DevOps and process advocacy (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, TDD, code reviews)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume (though equivalent frameworks used)
German language proficiency is only basic, may limit local team collaboration
Some roles involve legacy tech (DLang, Ember.js) — may require adjustment to modern stack
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds all core requirements with extensive full-stack experience, proven AI-agent work, and strong DevOps practices. While he lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, his deep familiarity with equivalent technologies (Node.js, testing frameworks, CI/CD) makes learning them trivial. His open-source contributions and communication skills further validate his fit. The minor language and tooling gaps are easily mitigated and do not outweigh his substantial strengths.
